title: osmanthus ilicifolius var. aureus
intro: Osmanthus ilicifolius var. aureus, also known as the golden tea olive, is a variety of the Osmanthus ilicifolius plant, which is a flowering plant native to southern China. The golden tea olive has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are believed to help soothe digestive issues, relieve stress, and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Osmanthus ilicifolius var. aureus include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Osmanthus ilicifolius var. aureus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
